description: Describe the Global Investment Performance Standards — who can claim compliance, benefits of compliance, fundamentals of compliance, and key verification and presentation requirements

purpose.fair_representation: Ethical, voluntary global standard for presenting performance
purpose.comparability: Prospective clients can compare firms on like-for-like basis

who_can_claim.firm_wide: Only at firm level; individual portfolios cannot claim GIPS compliance
who_can_claim.applicability: Investment management firms managing assets for third parties

benefits.controls: Strengthens internal controls and data quality

fundamentals_of_compliance.input_data: Fair value, accrual accounting, consistent valuation
fundamentals_of_compliance.calculation_methodology: Time-weighted returns, subperiod linking, geometric compounding
fundamentals_of_compliance.composites: All fee-paying discretionary portfolios in at least one composite
fundamentals_of_compliance.disclosures: Provide required disclosures in each presentation
fundamentals_of_compliance.presentation_and_reporting: Meet minimum reporting and statistic requirements

verification.optional_third_party: Independent verifier attests to firm-wide compliance
verification.composite_specific: Additional performance examination on individual composites

errors.message: compliance_status must be compliant, non_compliant, or pending_verification

anti_patterns.rule: Do not claim compliance at composite or product level
anti_patterns.why: GIPS applies firm-wide; partial compliance claims misrepresent the standard

anti_patterns.rule: Do not selectively present top-performing composite to win mandates
anti_patterns.why: Cherry-picking defeats the comparability purpose; GIPS requires consistent composite discipline

anti_patterns.rule: Do not treat GIPS verification as certifying individual composite accuracy
anti_patterns.why: Verification tests firm-wide processes; composite-specific examination is a separate engagement

goals.description: Describe the Global Investment Performance Standards — who can claim compliance, benefits of compliance, fundamentals of compliance, and key verification and presentation requirements

success_metrics.measurement: All decisions have complete audit trails

constraints.description: All operations must be auditable and traceable

tradeoffs.reason: trading operations require precise execution and full audit trails

invariants: error messages never expose internal system details
